configurations.name: Python 3.12 - venv/pip - SSE

commands.install: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pyenv local 3.12 && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt

configurations.description: Python 3.12 标准环境 (venv) - SSE 模式: 适用于 Web 服务部署。使用内置 venv 创建虚拟环境，pip 安装依赖，通过 HTTP SSE 暴露服务。
configurations.description_en: Python 3.12 Standard (venv) - SSE: Best for web deployment. Uses built-in venv and pip with HTTP SSE transport.

configurations.name: Python 3.12 - venv/pip - Stdio

args: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && source venv/bin/activate && exec python server/main.py --transport=stdio

commands.install: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pyenv local 3.12 && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && echo '{"mcpServers":{"default":{"command":"bash","args":["-c","source venv/bin/activate && exec python server/main.py --transport=stdio"],"cwd":"/app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor"}}}' > /app/mcp-servers.json

configurations.description: Python 3.12 标准环境 (venv) - Stdio 模式: 适用于 MCP 客户端集成 (如 Claude Desktop)。通过标准输入输出通信。
configurations.description_en: Python 3.12 Standard (venv) - Stdio: Best for MCP client integration. Uses stdio transport.

configurations.name: Python 3.12 - Poetry - SSE

commands.install: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pyenv local 3.12 && poetry env use python && poetry config virtualenvs.in-project true && poetry install

configurations.description: Python 3.12 工程化环境 (Poetry) - SSE 模式: 适用于需要严格依赖锁定的生产级 Web 项目。自动管理虚拟环境和依赖图。
configurations.description_en: Python 3.12 Engineering (Poetry) - SSE: For production web projects requiring strict dependency locking.

configurations.name: Python 3.12 - Poetry - Stdio

commands.install: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pyenv local 3.12 && poetry env use python && poetry config virtualenvs.in-project true && poetry install && echo '{"mcpServers":{"default":{"command":"poetry","args":["run","python","server/main.py","--transport=stdio"],"cwd":"/app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor"}}}' > /app/mcp-servers.json

configurations.description: Python 3.12 工程化环境 (Poetry) - Stdio 模式: 适用于需要严格依赖锁定的 MCP 客户端集成。
configurations.description_en: Python 3.12 Engineering (Poetry) - Stdio: For MCP client integration with strict dependency locking.

configurations.name: Python 3.11 - uv/pip - Streamable-HTTP

commands.install: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pyenv local 3.11 && uv venv && source .venv/bin/activate && uv pip install -r requirements.txt

configurations.description: Python 3.11 极速环境 (uv) - Streamable-HTTP 模式: 适用于追求极致性能的 Web 服务。使用 Rust 编写的 uv 工具和高效的 HTTP 流式传输。
configurations.description_en: Python 3.11 High Performance (uv) - Streamable-HTTP: For fastest setup and efficient HTTP streaming.

configurations.name: Node.js 20 - npm - SSE

commands.install: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm install 20 && nvm use 20 && cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && npm install

configurations.description: Node.js 20 LTS (npm) - SSE 模式: 推荐用于生产环境 Web 服务。使用 NVM 切换版本，npm 管理依赖。
configurations.description_en: Node.js 20 LTS (npm) - SSE: Recommended for production web services. Uses NVM and npm.

configurations.name: Node.js 20 - npm - Stdio

args: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && exec node index.js --transport=stdio

commands.install: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm install 20 && nvm use 20 && cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && npm install && echo '{"mcpServers":{"default":{"command":"bash","args":["-c","source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && exec node index.js --transport=stdio"],"cwd":"/app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor"}}}' > /app/mcp-servers.json

configurations.description: Node.js 20 LTS (npm) - Stdio 模式: 适用于 MCP 客户端集成。直接使用 node 运行以避免 npm 输出干扰标准流。
configurations.description_en: Node.js 20 LTS (npm) - Stdio: For MCP client integration. Runs directly with node to avoid npm noise.
